pr.title: WIP: Record: Copy Network + Dict Residual (LZ77 + Brotli compression-inspired)

output.summary: Frozen n-gram dictionary logits mix with transformer correction and a copy-pointer head to offload predictable/repetitive tokens before neural refinement.
techniques: Learned scalar blends frozen dictionary logits with transformer correction head
Copy attention over past tokens gated into final distribution
11-layer tied-embedding transformer focuses on residual semantics
